elements.text: One day Mis Wilson went shopping with Tracy and Ben hey went to the supermaket in the new shopping center. "Why do you bay things here?' Tracy wanted to know. "Because they are cheaper here than at the cother store near out home," Mrs Wilson said. " Help me check the prices, phase." The Wilsons wete not tich and Mrs Wilson was alway caretel With her money. She looked caretully at the prices of things. She bought lots of things in the supermaket. When they got home, the children said," We don't think you saved money by going to the supermakes." "Of course I did," Mrs. Wilson said " Everything was cheaper. "We khan," the children said," but we came home by taxi because we had too much to carry.
